description: Java entity class representing an email verification token with fields for token, user ID, expiration time, and usage status, including constructors and getter/setter methods.

classes.name: EmailVerificationToken
classes.description: Entity class mapped to 'email_verification_tokens' table, representing email verification tokens with relevant fields and methods.

methods.name: EmailVerificationToken
methods.description: Default constructor for the EmailVerificationToken entity.

methods.name: EmailVerificationToken
methods.description: Parameterized constructor initializing token, userId, and expiresAt fields.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the ID of the token.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the user ID associated with the token.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user ID associated with the token.

methods.name: getExpiresAt
methods.description: Returns the expiration time of the token.

methods.name: setExpiresAt
methods.description: Sets the expiration time of the token.

methods.name: isUsed
methods.description: Returns whether the token has been used.

methods.name: setUsed
methods.description: Sets the used status of the token.
